topic: Myth: 'My customers are all word-of-mouth, I don't need a website'
caption:
Word-of-mouth is great. But your next customer is still Googling you first.

No website means no credibility when it counts.

Give your referrals somewhere to land.

DM us SITE.

#HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #WebDesign #LocalSEO #VeteranOwned #ShopLocal #WordOfMouth #HighDesertBusiness #SmallBizTips
alt_text: Bold text graphic reading 'They were referred to you. Then they Googled you. Were you there?' on a clean dark background with the BuildMyWebNow logo.

copy.myth: My customers are all word-of-mouth, I don't need a website
copy.fact: Word-of-mouth now leads people straight to Google first
copy.body: Even a referral will look you up before calling. No site means lost trust before you ever get the chance.
